reviews.review_description:
Now at the start I did leave a 5 star to get a free cosmetic but aside from that I'll give my honest opinion

Pros -
I like the different fruits get you different items (talking about currency)
The grow a garden is a good idea getting money from selling crops or going into the Caves
I like the health feature where your vision get blurry after taking some hits

Cons - 
Laggy/buggy
Stole ideas from other games (cheese game)
Blur effects last for WAY TO LONG
Fire and rain sound effects are very loud
Water mechanic is a mix of 0grav and swimming (swimming only works on left hand for some reason)

Other than that this game is pretty good and with the new tag update I look forward to seeing this game thrive
It's really fun game but the thing is there's not that meny people

developer_response.body: Glad to hear you are having fun! We are sorry that there aren't many people online and we hope that changes one day, have fun being lazy!

reviews.review_title: I like this game even tho it's old

Lots of fun minigames and the perfect place to take a break from all the VR chaos
This game is so good cause we have good cosmetics good community and active mods and owners. And I am content creator and welling to help ppl. Downloaded Now
lol

This game is very underrated and NEEDS more players. Their paid bundles are very cheap (unlike other games) and are definitely worth it. The community is very good and bad Chimps get proper punishment. It's also very fun with many things to do and more coming soon.
Even when there's no one on there's till things to do and that's the best part you never get bored!

The only thing I liked about this game was the player model. The rest is to pixalated and dark. Needs more lights and cosmetics are difficult to buy. The only way to die in the laser mode is with your hands. Music is also pretty annoying. Overall a poor experience to have if you are looking for fun. One of the creators were very rude about about her fan game that had just been released and wasn’t even near completion yet.

developer_response.body: Thanks For The Feedback 🩷 , We are sorry to hear that from you and we will make the game better, we will look forward into adding more lights in dark places and making things easier to understand, you can mute the music by clicking the "off" button on the radio that is in every map with music, you should explore caves and get some gadgets, or garden a bit, give the game a try next month and I promise you, you will get hooked, we have revamped a lot of stuff and I'm sure you would love this update (coming next month), for more info contact support@lazychimpsvr.com or visit lazychimpsvr.com website, thanks 😊

developer_response.body: Thanks For The Feedback 🩷, the main point of the game is not just the couple game modes, I'd recommend you and your friend go in the caves area find some items to sell, sorry for the cosmetic issue were looking forward into making the game better, thanks for the review.

After having this game for some time I have found some good reasons for why this game is good. 
1 The Community
I have met mods in this game and they are always chill and friendly to me and each other. The discord server is pretty chill most of the time as well. 
2 The Actual Game Itself 
Despite just realeasing on the app store it has gamemodes like Lazer maze and find the button. These are really fun to play and I actually enjoyed them.  The map is well thought out and cool. 
3 The Future for This Game
The owners have clear update schedules and they do update around those times. They also have beta testers for the game. 
Overall all this stuff makes the game really great and enjoyable to play. I left out quite a lot that you can figure out when you get the game. Hoped this helped. Bye
There's a lot of fun to have and a great shop. Definitely check this game out.👍
